name: Warf / Coumadin
source_note: Data compiled for Arogya knowledge base. Verify against 1mg.com and pharmeasy.in for live updates.
how_it_works: Vitamin K antagonist that inhibits VKORC1 enzyme, preventing regeneration of Vitamin K, and reducing synthesis of clotting factors II, VII, IX, and X.
drug_interactions: Extremely long list — significant interactions with almost all drugs
Antibiotics alter gut flora and vitamin K
food_interactions: Consistent intake of leafy green vegetables (vitamin K) — do not drastically change diet
what_to_avoid: Regular INR monitoring is essential — never skip
Tell EVERY doctor you are on warfarin
Consistent diet of leafy greens (don't suddenly increase/decrease)
